infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow RedLOVE Today to use your camera for video calls.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow RedLOVE Today to use your microphone for voice calls, video calls, and voice notes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow RedLOVE Today to access your photos so you can upload profile pictures.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow RedLOVE Today to use your camera so you can take a profile picture.
Allow RedLOVE Today to use your camera for video calls.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow RedLOVE Today to use your microphone for voice and video calls.
Allow RedLOVE Today to use your microphone for voice calls, video calls, and voice notes.
